data.title: Monolithic Codebase
data.description: Instagram employs a large, intertwined codebase that may be difficult to scale and manage.
data.technical_spec: PHP-based server-side with React Native for mobile UI.

data.title: Microservices Transition
data.description: Gradual shift from monolithic to microservices architecture to improve scalability.
data.technical_spec: Containers, Kubernetes, and service-oriented architecture principles.

data.title: Data Storage Solutions
data.description: Utilizes a combination of SQL and NoSQL databases for efficient data management.
data.technical_spec: MySQL and Cassandra for structured and unstructured data.

data.title: High Availability
data.description: The architecture is designed for high uptime with global CDN deployment.
data.technical_spec: Use of distributed data centers and load balancers such as HAProxy.

data.title: API-Driven Development
data.description: Extensive use of APIs for both internal functions and public endpoints.
